message:
feat: add phase field support for gpt-5.3-codex

Parse and replay the `phase` annotation ("commentary", "final_answer")
on OpenAI Responses API message items. Without this, phase metadata is
dropped during history reconstruction, causing performance degradation
on gpt-5.3-codex per the Codex Prompting Guide.

- Add Phase string to ContentPart (omitempty, invisible to other providers)
- Parse phase from message items in fromResponses()
- Group consecutive text parts by phase in toResponsesInput(), emitting
  one message item per phase group
- Empty phase produces identical output to pre-5.3 models (backward compat)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -90,6 +90,7 @@ type ContentPart struct {
 	Kind ContentKind `json:"kind"`
 
 	Text       string          `json:"text,omitempty"`
+	Phase      string          `json:"phase,omitempty"` // OpenAI Responses API phase ("commentary", "final_answer")
 	Image      *ImageData      `json:"image,omitempty"`
 	Audio      *AudioData      `json:"audio,omitempty"`
 	Document   *DocumentData   `json:"document,omitempty"`
